posts.notes: Gift-buyer angle. Keep links blank until a real store URL exists. Approved short-video MP4 uses the title Search with Ember 2 and is ready for TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and Facebook Reels posting.

required_hashtags.note: Use the full original discovery hashtag block plus the two additional dragon hashtags in posting captions; do not replace the original tags with only the dragon tags.

approved_feed_still_assets.rule: Instagram/Facebook feed stills require separately approved native 4:5 images. One approved meta_feed_4x5 image may be used for both Facebook and Instagram if it is approved for both. Do not crop, resize, or repurpose 9:16 Pinterest/Shorts/Story art into feed stills.
approved_feed_still_assets.posting_schedule_check: Before a feed-still task is treated as live-postable, the schedule or handoff must check whether the matching approved 4:5 image exists, first via approved_platform_assets.meta_feed_4x5 and then via platform-specific 4:5 slots.
approved_feed_still_assets.posting_pack_requirement: Posting packs must include the approved 4:5 image path for each Instagram/Facebook feed-still task, or show a missing-asset blocker instead of only listing the older vertical campaign image. The same meta_feed_4x5 path can appear on both platform tasks when it is the approved shared feed image.

posting_requirements.notes: Every campaign day requires three Pinterest still Pins. Every short-video bundle requires YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Instagram Reels, Facebook Reels, and Pinterest Video Pin. Use #dragonbooks and #dragonbooksforkids wherever hashtag-friendly posting surfaces use hashtags. Instagram/Facebook feed stills require separately approved native 4:5 images in posting schedules and posting packs.
